# Blue Avenue Stitches

> Premium uniform supply and professional tailoring services in Dubai, UAE.

## About

Blue Avenue Stitches is a leading uniform supplier and professional tailoring company based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. We specialise in high-quality stitching and manufacturing of corporate, medical, hospitality, school, and industrial uniforms.

## Services

- Corporate Uniform Stitching (suits, shirts, office wear)
- Medical Scrubs & Lab Coats
- School Uniform Manufacturing
- Hospitality Staff Uniforms (chef coats, wait-staff attire)
- Industrial Workwear
- Custom Logo Embroidery & Screen Printing
- Bulk Uniform Orders

## Location

West Zone Supermarket Building, Union Metro Station Exit 2, Dubai, UAE

## Contact

- Phone: 045753696
- Website: https://blueavenuestitches.ae

## Key Facts

- Based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Serves the entire UAE
- Standard lead time: 7–14 business days
- Express services available for urgent requirements
- High-precision custom logo embroidery and screen printing
